title: ReactiveUI widget prop-map entry
description: The SINGLE SOURCE for each wrapped Slate widget (component-pipeline station 1 writes it; the adapter implementation, the LSP markup vocabulary, and the docs elements page are all generated from / checked against it — MASTER_PLAN D-11/D-23). One JSON file per widget lives next to this schema once Phase 2 starts (templates/prop-map/<Tag>.json); scripts/docs-drift.mjs counts them.

tag.description: Markup tag / factory name = the Slate class minus its S type-prefix, letter-for-letter (VerticalBox, TextBlock, Slider — D-33); OUR custom widgets carry the Rui mark (RuiCanvas)

header.description: Engine header path the research station read (ground truth — outranks web docs)

slotProps.description: Parent-owned per-slot layout props exposed under the child's slot.* namespace (padding/halign/valign/fill/zorder)

name.description: The Unreal property/delegate name VERBATIM, minus Set for setters (WidthOverride, OnClicked, OnCheckStateChanged — D-33); no React aliases

delegate.description: The Slate event (FOnClicked) and its setter if any

reply.description: true if the delegate returns FReply (proxy returns Handled() for void user callbacks; FReply overload exposed where pass-through matters)

reconstructOn.description: Prop names that are construct-only (SLATE_ARGUMENT / no setter) — changing one REPLACES the widget (focus/caret/scroll loss; documented per widget). Hot-path style keys must never appear here (D-13).

poolable.description: false for stateful widgets (editable text, list views) — excluded from the widget pool

kind.description: SLATE_ATTRIBUTE (bindable, has/gets a setter) vs SLATE_ARGUMENT (construct-only -> reconstructOn)

setter.description: Post-construction setter if one exists (SetText). Absent + kind=attribute means verify the header again before assuming.

styleKey.description: The style-dict key this prop is exposed as, if styleable

default.description: Engine default (reset target for style-key removal)

deprecated.description: Set when deprecated (D-30) — the LSP surfaces it
